publishedAbstract: ODF: After migrating "`OpenShift SDN`" to "`OVN-Kubernetes`" the Ceph MONs Containers are in CLBO and will not form a quorum. Example mon-a deployment: ~~~ $ oc describe pod rook-ceph-mon-a-576567fb9c-zgr6v Name: rook-ceph-mon-a-576567fb9c-zgr6v Namespace: openshift-storage Priority: 2000001000 Priority Class Name: system-node-critical Service Account: rook-ceph-default Node: clusterd-x9bnf-infra-wttt7/172.23.62.149 Start Time: Wed, 15 Jan 2025 12:26:50-0500 Labels: app=rook-ceph-mon app.kubernetes.io/component=cephclusters.ceph.rook.io app.kubernetes.io/created-by=rook-ceph-operator app.kubernetes.io/instance=a app.kubernetes.io/managed-by=rook-ceph-operator app.kubernetes.io/name=ceph-mon app.kubernetes.io/part-of=ocs-storagecluster-cephcluster ceph_daemon_id=a ceph_daemon_type=mon mon=a mon_cluster=openshift-storage odf-resource-profile= pod-template-hash=576567fb9c pvc_name=rook-ceph-mon-a pvc_size=50Gi rook.io/operator-namespace=openshift-storage rook_cluster=openshift-storage Annotations: k8s.ovn.org/pod-networks: Redacted... k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/network-status: [{"name": "openshift-sdn", <-- sdn ~~~ Example mon-c deployment: ~~~ $ oc describe pod rook-ceph-mon-c-79fd95b67c-rdmf9 Name: rook-ceph-mon-c-79fd95b67c-rdmf9 Namespace: openshift-storage Priority: 2000001000 Priority Class Name: system-node-critical Service Account: rook-ceph-default Node: clusterd-x9bnf-infra-f28v4/172.23.62.133 Start Time: Wed, 15 Jan 2025 15:33:10-0500 Labels: app=rook-ceph-mon app.kubernetes.io/component=cephclusters.ceph.rook.io app.kubernetes.io/created-by=rook-ceph-operator app.kubernetes.io/instance=c app.kubernetes.io/managed-by=rook-ceph-operator app.kubernetes.io/name=ceph-mon app.kubernetes.io/part-of=ocs-storagecluster-cephcluster ceph_daemon_id=c ceph_daemon_type=mon mon=c mon_cluster=openshift-storage odf-resource-profile= pod-template-hash=79fd95b67c pvc_name=rook-ceph-mon-c pvc_size=50Gi rook.io/operator-namespace=openshift-storage rook_cluster=openshift-storage Annotations: k8s.ovn.org/pod-networks: Redacted... k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/network-status: [{"name": "ovn-kubernetes", <-- ovn ~~~ Note: One Pod is OVN while the other is SDN. The Ceph MON Pods are unable to communicate while this situation exists. Check the routes on the nodes hosting Ceph MON Pods by debugging into the node: ~~~ $ oc project openshift-storage $ oc get pod-o wide | grep mon ~~~ Run this command on the nodes hosting a Ceph MON Pod ~~~ $ oc debug node/{node name hosting ceph mon}-- chroot /host sh-c "ip r" Temporary namespace openshift-debug-7hl9c is created for debugging node... Starting pod/clusterd-x9bnf-worker-9kj95-debug-flv9t... To use host binaries, run `chroot /host` default via 172.23.62.254 dev br-ex proto dhcp src 172.23.62.117 metric 48 10.128.0.0/14 dev tun0 scope link [7] 10.131.2.0/23 dev ovn-k8s-mp0 proto kernel scope link src 10.131.2.2 169.254.169.0/29 dev br-ex proto kernel scope link src 169.254.169.2 169.254.169.1 dev br-ex src 172.23.62.117 169.254.169.3 via 10.131.2.1 dev ovn-k8s-mp0 172.23.62.0/24 dev br-ex proto kernel scope link src 172.23.62.117 metric 48 172.30.0.0/16 dev tun0 [7] Removing debug pod... Temporary namespace openshift-debug-7hl9c was removed. ~~~ The presence of "`tun0`" [7] shows SDN is still in place.
publishedTitle: ODF:  After migrating "OpenShift SDN" to "OVN-Kubernetes" the Ceph MONs Containers are in CLBO and will not form a quorum.
